rationale: SOS-assigned registration number for the mark being cancelled (optional per the form's '(if known)' qualifier).

label_verbatim: B.1: TEXT — list word(s) protected in the original registration, if any (line 1)
rationale: Word(s) of the mark being cancelled (line 1). Same key family as MARK_mark1.

label_verbatim: B.2: FEATURES — describe in detail the design protected in the original registration, if any (line 1)
rationale: Design-features description (line 1). Same key family as MARK_mark1.

rationale: Printed name and capacity of the registrant or assignee of record. Mark forms use mark.signer.* (not filing.signer.*) — same convention as MARK_mark1.
